Name: team-notes-pro-waf
Description: WAF for Team Notes Pro ALB — rate limiting + AWS managed protections

Rules._comment: Rule 0: Rate limit — block any IP sending > 2000 requests per 5 minutes (~6 req/s sustained). Evaluated first (lowest priority number) so abusive IPs are blocked before managed rules inspect them.
Rules.Name: RateLimit

Rules._comment: Rule 1: AWS IP Reputation List — blocks IPs associated with bots, scrapers, and known malicious actors. Near-zero false positive rate, safe to set to Block.
Rules.Name: AWSManagedRulesAmazonIpReputationList

Rules._comment: Rule 2: Common Rule Set (OWASP Top 10) — SQL injection, XSS, path traversal, etc. SizeRestrictions_BODY is overridden to Count because notes can legitimately be large.
Rules.Name: AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet

Rules._comment: Rule 3: Known Bad Inputs — blocks Log4Shell, SSRF patterns, and other known exploit payloads. Very low false positive rate.
Rules.Name: AWSManagedRulesKnownBadInputsRuleSet
